race.comment: Tough race but DON'T GIVE UP (1) is progressive well and looks close to a win. Runner-up over 1650m latest and can go one better. ALISENT (5) was sixth in the same race as DON'T GIVE UP but was fresh from a break. Fitter and extra trip a plus. Very well weighted with the claim and can go close. MERLIN BEACH (2) was well back in trip and almost pinched a 1350m race here last time. Back up in journey but honest and expected to feature. ALPINE TROUT (4) proved too strong two runs ago at this track. Safely held last time out when fifth over 1880m at this track, beaten 4.5 lengths after being prominent at the bend. Get a chance to bounce back. TIDEFORD (3) is building towards a win with placings at his last two runs, the latest effort a third over 1880m at this track when beaten 0.9 lengths. Likely to push forward and race on the pace. Must be respected.
